title: SQLancer causing 'algebra.select' undefined error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl_ProductSales (ColID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, Product_Category VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, Product_Name VARCHAR(64), TotalSales INT CHECK (TotalSales >= 0));

INSERT INTO tbl_ProductSales (ColID, Product_Category, Product_Name, TotalSales) VALUES (1, 'Game', 'Mobo Game', 200), (2, 'Game', 'PKO Game', 400), (3, 'Fashion', 'Shirt', 500), (4, 'Fashion', 'Shorts', 100), (5, NULL, 'Unknown', 300);
CREATE TABLE another_T (col1 INT, col2 INT, col3 INT, col4 INT, col5 INT, col6 INT, col7 INT, col8 INT);

SELECT another_T.col1 FROM tbl_ProductSales CROSS JOIN another_T WHERE (tbl_ProductSales.Product_Category IS NULL) OR (tbl_ProductSales.Product_Category NOT IN (SELECT Product_Category FROM tbl_ProductSales));
key_bug_features: CROSS JOIN with NULL condition on product_category
